summary: Iter11 Sprint 6 — (A) Staging/Production pairing + promote-flow on /api/apps, (B) full Admin Console user-management at /api/admin/users/*. 24/24 GREEN (100%). Verified: (A1) POST /api/apps respects environment='staging'|'production' and defaults to 'production' when omitted. (A2) GET /apps/{id}/pair-candidates returns {target_environment, candidates[]} where target_environment is the opposite env; candidates are same-workspace apps with opposite env that are unpaired OR already paired to this same app. (A3) POST /apps/{id}/pair sets paired_app_id on BOTH apps; rejects same-environment (400), self-pair (400). (A4) POST /apps/{id}/unpair clears both sides. (A5) POST /apps/{id}/promote copies env_vars + branch from src→dest (verified PROMO_KEY and branch='feature/promote-test' propagated), queues deployment with trigger='promote', writes audit_log action='app.promote' (matched by resource_id); returns 400 when no pair. (B1) GET /admin/users returns {users,total,limit,offset}; each row has workspaces_count + credits_total; password_hash + _id never leak; case-insensitive q-search by email works; non-admin → 403. (B2) GET /admin/users/{id} returns {user,workspaces[],audit[],available_plans[]}; each workspace has plan_details + apps_count + payments_count; user has no password_hash. (B3) Password reset hashes via hash_password, audit row 'admin.user.password_reset' written, demo can re-login with new pw; min-length 8 enforced (422 on 'short'). (B4) Role flip admin↔user works both ways. (B5) Suspend rejects self-suspend (400); toggle works on demo. (B6) DELETE self → 400 (verified on admin acct). (B7) Credits adjust: positive delta increases balance, negative delta floors at 0, wrong-owner workspace → 400/404, credit_transactions row created with kind='admin_adjustment' + actor_email. (B8) Plan change: 'pro' accepted, unknown plan 'platinum' → 400, restored to 'agency'. (B9) GET /admin/users/{id}/payments groups by workspace, totals contain paid_eur+payments+invoices. Regression: app.create still mints webhook_secret + writes app.create audit; demo workspace 'Acme Studio' confirmed back on agency plan, no leftover TEST_iter11_ apps in db.
action_items: (Carried over from iter10, MEDIUM) services/notifications_sms.py L88 — add 'slack','discord' to the iteration tuple so slack/discord with no webhook URL returns status='skipped' instead of empty results.
critical_code_review_comments: routers/admin_users.py L196-199 — last-admin guard on DELETE uses `{'role':'admin','is_active':{'$ne':False}}` count, but L194 self-delete check uses `actor.get('id')` from `get_current_user`; consistent with role-change guard. Note that the current preview env has 2 admins (admin@deployhub.dev + martijn@servunit.com), so the last-admin guard cannot be exercised end-to-end without intentionally demoting both — my test now branches on `len(active_admins) == 1` to avoid that.

routers/admin_users.py L200-203 — DELETE flow does `delete_one(user)` → `delete_many(workspace_members)` → `update_many(workspaces, owner_id=None)`. Apps owned by orphaned workspaces are not touched. With Coolify live and orphan workspaces having no owner, future audits/billing will need to handle owner_id=None gracefully. Consider also deleting/orphaning db.apps + db.deployments rows or document the orphan policy.

routers/admin_users.py L74 — `db.users.find(filt, {'_id':0}).sort('created_at',-1).skip(offset).limit(limit).to_list(limit)`. If a user doc has no `created_at` field (older seed?), Mongo treats it as null and sort order becomes implementation-defined. Recommend `$ifNull` or guaranteeing created_at on seed.

routers/admin_users.py L237 `'id': __import__('uuid').uuid4().hex` — inline `__import__` is functional but fragile. Move `import uuid` to module top with the other imports for readability and lint cleanliness.

routers/admin_users.py L271 — plan validation pulls `list_plans()` on every POST. Cheap enough but cacheable in services/plans if list grows. Also, passing `'free'`/`'hobby'` aliases is not validated here, only against `id`. Pydantic Literal in models.CheckoutIn does enforce free|hobby|pro|agency for checkout; mismatched validation surfaces possible.

routers/apps.py::pair_app L914 compares `(app.get('environment') or 'production') == (peer.get('environment') or 'production')` — correctly normalises legacy rows with no env field. Note: pair_app does NOT call `assert_limit` or any plan check (intentional, pairing is metadata), which is fine.

routers/apps.py::promote_app L990 forces dest.branch := src.branch even if src.branch is None (falls back to dest.branch). With the new env handling, an empty src env_vars dict will overwrite dest env_vars entirely. Consider documenting the 'promote replaces, not merges' semantic, or add a merge flag.

routers/apps.py::promote_app L993-997 — coolify.update_env is awaited inline before the BackgroundTasks redeploy; if Coolify is slow this blocks the response. Consider moving env sync into the same background task as the redeploy.
routers/apps.py::pair_candidates L959-967 — returns at most 50 candidates with no offset/pagination. Probably fine for human-facing dropdown but worth documenting the cap.

Test side-effect risk (now mitigated): role-flip test that demotes admin@deployhub.dev succeeded because martijn@servunit.com is also admin. Updated test to count admins first; safer for next iteration.
test_credentials: admin@deployhub.dev / admin123 (role=admin); demo@deployhub.dev / demo1234 (owns Acme Studio ws ee9ace3a-0b82-4df5-9dd7-d543c1e0c022 on agency plan). NOTE: db.users now also contains martijn@servunit.com (role=admin) — there are 2 admins total in the preview env, so the last-admin guard cannot be exercised by demoting admin@deployhub.dev alone.
seed_data_creation: Module-scoped `created_apps` list tracks every TEST_iter11_* app spawned by the 9 pairing tests + 1 regression test (~12 apps). Module teardown DELETEs each one via demo session — verified post-run with `db.apps.count_documents({name: /^TEST_iter11_/})` = 0. Demo workspace credits_balance was adjusted +50, then -10M (floored to 0), then +10 → final balance 10. Demo password was reset to 'demo1234' (same as original). Demo workspace plan was switched pro → agency back to original. No Coolify resources were left dangling because the test uses `framework='static'` and Hello-World repo which Coolify accepts and which we DELETE immediately.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter11 Sprint 6 is 100% GREEN. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_iter11_sprint6.py (24 tests, 3 classes) — re-runnable as-is. Demo workspace 'Acme Studio' (ee9ace3a-0b82-4df5-9dd7-d543c1e0c022) confirmed on agency plan with credits_balance=10. Both admin users (admin@deployhub.dev, martijn@servunit.com) intact + active. Tests use python-dotenv loading from /app/frontend/.env. Coolify is live so app creates do hit the VPS — the fixture diligently cleans up. The only outstanding issue across all iterations is the iter10 slack/discord 'skipped' miss in services/notifications_sms.py L88; not exercised here.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found in Sprint 6 contracts. Single test-side-effect during initial run (role-flip test demoting admin@) was due to the preview env having 2 admin accounts (martijn@servunit.com unknown at design time). Mitigation applied: test now reads admin count first and only asserts the last-admin guard when active_admins==1. Restored admin role on admin@deployhub.dev via one-off motor script before re-running the suite to 100%.
